text: For multi-file, shared, or critical code, present the plan and wait for required approval before editing.
Characterize load-bearing invariants before editing: concurrency, idempotency, money/time, authorization, audit data, and applied migrations.
Never modify tests merely to make them pass unless the task explicitly changes test behavior; suspect production code first.
Never use a library before confirming it exists in the manifest or lockfile and matches neighboring code.
On environment failures, report the blocker and route around it; do not perform silent environment surgery.
